text:
Death & Birth Certificates
Death & Birth Certificates
Effective January 1, 2026, the California Department of Public Health - Vital Records (CDPH-VR) will increase vital records fee for certified copies, pursuant to Assembly Bill (AB) 64 (chapter 662, Statutes of 2025)
PHS only has access to records for the current and past year. Older records are maintained by:
County Recorder's Office - Vital Records
44 N. San Joaquin St., 2nd Floor Ste. 260
Stockton, CA 95202
Phone: (209) 468-3939
To purchase record copies in person for current and past calendar year only:
PHS Vital Records Office
1601 E. Hazelton Ave
Stockton, CA 95205
Phone: (209) 468-3401
To order certified record copies* by mail for the current and past calendar year only, print the application forms below and mail with a check or money order to:
Public Health Services - Vital Records
P.O. Box 2009
Stockton,
 CA 95201
Fee Schedule
Type of Record
New Fee- Effective January 1, 2026 (per Copy)
Death Record
Any type (except veteran or natural disaster victims)
$26.00
Veterans per GC 6107
$0.00
Victims of Natural Disasters per Exec. Orders
$0.00
Birth Records
General Public
$31.00
Government / Law enforcement Agency  (official Use)
$24.00
Homeless Person per HSC 103577
$0.00
Foster Youth per HSC 103578
$0.00
Disposition (Burial) Permit
$12.00
Fetal Death Record
$23.00

Application (English)
* In an attempt to stop the illegal use of birth and death certificates, and as part of the effort to reduce identity theft, there has been a change in law and the way that certified copies of birth and death certificates can be obtained.
